title: ochrosia calocarpa
intro: Ochrosia calocarpa, also known as the Bird's Eye or Queensland Bird's Eye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ochrosia calocarpa include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ochrosia calocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified practitioner.
